name: Blond Brownies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz (1 pkg) white cake mix - no sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, eggs, granulated brown sugar, and water in a mixing bowl. Beat until well blended and thickened.
2. Fold in the chocolate chips.
3. Pour batter into two greased and papered 8-inch pans.
4. Bake at 375 degrees for 12 to 15 minutes or until brownies are done.
5. Cut into 2-inch squares.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE PER SQUARES
CAL: 1 SQUARE: 56
